name: Stop Pat Toomey
subject: “especially vulnerable” (Post-Gazette)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/3182080233826156544/-8676443067361787904?refcode=e20160512&refcode2=e20160512nd&amount=25)
---
**_Pittsburgh Post-Gazette_ : Pat Toomey is "especially vulnerable"**
**[We can defeat Toomey, friend! Chip in now>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/3182080233826156544/-8676443067361787904?refcode=e20160512&refcode2=e20160512nd&amount=25)** Friend -- The _Post-Gazette_ nailed it: Katie's race "could help determine which party controls the upper chamber." In other words, this race will be ground zero in the fight for the Senate -- and the future of our country.

[**And the latest polling (MCGINTY: 44, TOOMEY: 45) shows the race as a dead heat! Pitch in now to tip the scales to Katie! >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3182080233826156544/-8676443067361787904?refcode=e20160512&refcode2=e20160512nd&amount=25)

If we fight hard enough, we can elect a strong Democrat to the White House, take back the Senate, and elect Pennsylvania's first woman senator, Katie McGinty. It also means we can end Toomey's obstruction, like his _refusal to even vote_ on President Obama's nominee to fill the Supreme Court vacancy.

But if we fall short, it'll be six more years of Toomey, Mitch McConnell and his GOP-controlled Senate -- and a disaster for America. We simply can't afford that outcome.

**Friend, we don 't have Pat Toomey's millions or his rich, Wall Street funded, super PAC friends -- but we have _you_. And if Democrats everywhere help out, Toomey's got no chance.**

[**Will you please chip in now to defeat Toomey and elect Katie?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3182080233826156544/-8676443067361787904?refcode=e20160512&refcode2=e20160512nd&amount=25)

Thanks,

Team Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3182080233826156544/-8676443067361787904?refcode=e20160512&refcode2=e20160512nd&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/3182080233826156544/-8748500661399715840).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

If we fight hard enough, we can elect a strong Democrat to the White House, take back the Senate, and elect Pennsylvania's first woman senator, Katie McGinty. It also means we can end Toomey's obstruction, like his refusal to even vote on President Obama's nominee to fill the Supreme Court vacancy. name: Koster for Missouri
subject: Thank you for signing up
body:
Hello --

Thank you for joining the team that's working to bring new ideas to every corner of Missouri.

Chris Koster is counting you to help build this organization and make things happen.

Here are two more ways you can help out right now:

Like Chris Koster on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/missouriansforkoster)**.

Follow Chris Koster on **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/koster4missouri)**.

Thank you,

Chris Koster for Missouri

Here are two more ways you can help out right now: Like Chris Koster on . Follow Chris Koster on . Thank you, Chris Koster for Missouri

name: Mike Weinholtz
subject: Thank you for signing up!
body:
Dear Peter,
Thank you for joining our campaign. With your support, we'll win in November. This year is the year we can turn the state blue!
[**Donate now to help us elect a Democrat to the Governor 's office. Your donation will help us spread our message across the state. Even $5, $10, or $50 can make a difference.**](https://act.myngp.com/Forms/-8447963458342548736)
Thank you for your support,
Mike Weinholtz
[Mike Weinholtz](http://mikeforutah.com)
clean_body: Dear Peter, Thank you for joining our campaign. With your support, we'll win in November. This year is the year we can turn the state blue! Thank you for your support, Mike Weinholtz

name: Tim Henderson, GreggForGovernor.com
subject: Another failed attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
body:
Governor Pence made it clear that he'd rather spend time attacking John with baseless claims than defend his own failed record.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1923528970175379456/5524929981723314176?utm_campaign=fnd_pncatk_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160512_fnd_gq_pncatk_ndn__th
&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---
Peter, We knew this was coming. Yesterday, Governor Pence launched another false attack against John -- and we can't let his lies stand. **Will you chip in $5 or more today to help us fight the smears and set the record straight?** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**Express Donate: $5 ** ](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1923528970175379456/5524929981723314176?utm_campaign=fnd_pncatk_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160512_fnd_gq_pncatk_ndn__th
&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&express_lane=true&amount=5)
---

[**Express Donate: $25 ** ](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1923528970175379456/5524929981723314176?utm_campaign=fnd_pncatk_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160512_fnd_gq_pncatk_ndn__th
&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&express_lane=true&amount=25)
---

[**Express Donate: $50 ** ](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1923528970175379456/5524929981723314176?utm_campaign=fnd_pncatk_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160512_fnd_gq_pncatk_ndn__th
&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&express_lane=true&amount=50)
---

[**Or, donate another amount** ](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1923528970175379456/5524929981723314176?utm_campaign=fnd_pncatk_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160512_fnd_gq_pncatk_ndn__th
&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---
On the first day of his "Start Your Engines" tour -- a gimmicky series of speeches designed to help rescue his flailing campaign -- Governor Pence made it clear he'd rather spend time personally attacking John with baseless claims than defend his own failed record.
Hoosiers deserve better. While Governor Pence tries to whitewash his four years of failure, this campaign will remain focused on the issues most important to Hoosiers -- creating good-paying jobs, investing in education, and building a strong future for the next generation.
If yesterday's attack is any indication, John's going to have sink a lot of time and resources into peeling back fibs and falsehoods over the next few months to make sure voters hear the truth. And he needs your help.
**[Help John fight back against Governor Pence's attacks. Chip in $5 now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1923528970175379456/5524929981723314176?utm_campaign=fnd_pncatk_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160512_fnd_gq_pncatk_ndn__th
&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)**
Thank you for your support,
Tim Henderson
Campaign Manager
Gregg for Governor

| [**Chip in $5 ->**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1923528970175379456/5524929981723314176?utm_campaign=fnd_pncatk_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160512_fnd_gq_pncatk_ndn__th
&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1923528970175379456/5885217951912953856) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1923528970175379456/5957275545950881792)

name: Team Van Hollen
subject: SIGN ON: Help protect American consumers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Friend, did you see Chris's email?

Republicans in Congress are working to advance legislation that allows Wall Street and big money special interests to make dangerous billion dollar bets.

[**Add your name now and demand that Republicans in Congress act to protect American consumers.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d17/70cdc2ba/47e02c8b/396dab3/523399841/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/tell-congress-to-protect-american-consumers?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+We+cannot+let+this+stand+Please+add+your&utm_campaign=em051016&source=em051016")

\---Original Forwarded Message ---
> Friend,
>
> Congress is back in session this week and the Republicans are back to pushing for sweetheart deals for big money special interests.
>
> At this moment, Republicans are working to advance legislation that would not only allow but protect Wall Street and major corporations as they play fast and loose with billions in dangerous bets and trading. The House has already acted on this bill. Now, it is in the Senate.
>
> I've been fighting against this kind of reckless legislation for a very long time. [**We cannot let this stand. Please add your name and demand that Republicans in Congress act to protect American consumers.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d17/70cdc2ba/47e02c8b/396dab3/523399841/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/tell-congress-to-protect-american-consumers?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+We+cannot+let+this+stand+Please+add+your&utm_campaign=em051016&source=em051016")
>
> Supporters of the so-called Commodity End-User Relief Act are hoping that by pretending this bill benefits farmers and ranchers, we'll turn a blind eye to this reckless legislation. They're wrong.
>
> Farmers and ranchers aren't making the billion dollar bets that this legislation permits -- it's Wall Street, big oil companies, and Koch Industries who are. This legislation would undermine the ability of the Commodity Futures Trading Commission to do its job and protect consumers, American farmers, and our economy.
>
> [**Please join me in signing this petition to tell Senate Majority leader Mitch McConnell that in its current state, the Commodity End-User Relief Act is dangerous to our economy, consumers and common sense oversight. It 's absolutely unacceptable. >>>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d17/70cdc2ba/47e02c8b/396dab3/523399841/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/tell-congress-to-protect-american-consumers?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+We+cannot+let+this+stand+Please+add+your&utm_campaign=em051016&source=em051016")
>
> Thank you for adding your voice,
>
> Chris
> | **[SIGN MY NAME>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d17/70cdc2ba/47e02c8b/396dab3/523399841/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/tell-congress-to-protect-american-consumers?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+We+cannot+let+this+stand+Please+add+your&utm_campaign=em051016&source=em051016")**
> ---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d17/70cdc2ba/47e02c8b/396d94e/523399841/VEsD/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em051216&source=em051216") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Phil=20Scott=20for=20Vermont?=
subject: Newsletter Sign Ups: Please Confirm Subscription
body:
** Please Confirm Subscription

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Thanks!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington (D)
body:
Dear Friend --

Thank you so much for joining my team. I look forward to staying in touch
with you as we work together to bring the reforms that will keep Washington
moving forward.

There will be a lot that you can do to help in the weeks and months ahead,
but for now I hope you'll take a minute to join us on *Facebook*
<http://facebook.com/jayinslee> and *Twitter
<http://twitter.com/jayinslee>*, and then invite your friends and family to
join his team by forwarding them the message below.

It's going to take all of us working together to build a bright future for
all Washingtonians. Thanks again for joining the team and sharing our
message with your friends. Talk to you soon!

Very truly yours,

Jay Inslee

----------

Hey!

Governor Jay Inslee has been hard at work in Olympia to create a working
Washington. But it's going take all of us working together to keep our
state moving forward, and he needs our help.

That's why I just signed up to join his team and help support Jay -- will
you join me and do the same?

*Visit Jay's website at http://JayInslee.com and sign up to join his team
today! <http://jayinslee.com>*

Thanks!

Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington (D)
PO Box 21067
Seattle, WA 98111

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Thanks for joining our team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd3b3/2a380d31/121795c5/f89c65/2404777063/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd3b3/2a380d31/121795c5/f89c65/2404777063/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Friends --
I can't thank you enough for joining our grassroots effort to win in New Hampshire and turn the Senate blue.
You're the backbone of this campaign -- you're why I'm running. **[Help make sure our voices are heard in Washington by adding your name today.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd3b3/2a380d31/121795c5/f89c66/2404777063/VEsF/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/take-back-the-senate")**
Friends -- like me, you understand it's important that everyone has access to a quality, affordable college education, and you're fighting to protect a woman's right to make her own health care decisions. Bottom line: You believe hardworking families come first.
I'm fighting to bring our values to the United States Senate, but with our opponents already spending millions to defeat us, I need your support:
**[Add your name right now to help build the strongest grassroots team in the country to win in New Hampshire and make our voices heard in Washington.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd3b3/2a380d31/121795c5/f89c66/2404777063/VEsC/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/take-back-the-senate")**
I'm grateful to have you by my side, and I know that if we roll up our sleeves and work together, we can make real progress for New Hampshire and our country.
With every good wish,
Maggie
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd3b3/2a380d31/121795c5/f89c67/2404777063/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuLXdlbGNvbWUxIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlV2VsY29tZTEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan-welcome1?refcode=eWelcome1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd3b3/2a380d31/121795c5/f89c60/2404777063/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Oregon and Kentucky could set the frame for the rest of the contests
body:
#
Dear Bernie Supporter,
After our big wins in Indiana and West Virginia, Oregon and Kentucky are coming up this Tuesday. And if everyone who has signed up to support Bernie takes just an hour or two this weekend to call some voters, we stand a very good chance of winning both these states and keeping our momentum rolling into the June contests.
**So we're calling for an all-hands-on-the-phones mobilizationthis weekend** to identify Bernie supporters in the upcoming states, and get them out to vote. **Can you help out?**
**[Yes, I'll make some calls for Bernie this weekend](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/call-out-the-vote?source=em160512 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/call-out-the-vote?source=em160512")**
If you've never made phone calls to voters before, don't worry. It's pretty easy. All you need is a computer or a tablet, and a phone. There's a simple script for you to follow, and there are volunteers standing by on livechat to help if you get stuck. You can call on your own from home, or **[attend a phonebank party near you with other Bernie supporters.](http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=20&sort=time&f%5B%5D=campaign-office&f%5B%5D=phonebank "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=20&sort=time&f%5B%5D=campaign-office&f%5B%5D=phonebank")**
We're going to keep fighting hard until the very end of this primary contest, because we know Bernie is **by far** the better candidate to defeat Trump in November. Every vote we win and delegate we claim sends an unmistakable message to the political establishment about the strength of our progressive agenda.
**When we stand together, there is nothing we cannot accomplish.** So we hope you'll continue fighting with us and keep this political revolution rolling strong - all the way to the convention in Philadelphia.
**[Sign up to call some voters this weekend.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/call-out-the-vote?source=em160512 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/call-out-the-vote?source=em160512")**
In solidarity,
Team Bernie
P.S. If you'd like to hear more about the importance of Kentucky, Oregon and our voter contact goals for the rest of the campaign, please **[join us on a special livestream event tomorrow](http://bernie.to/volstream "http://bernie.to/volstream")** (Friday) at 6 pm ET/3 pm PT.

**[I can't volunteer, but I'll contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets_go_bernie?refcode=em160512 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets_go_bernie?refcode=em160512")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: ''He can’t win, can he?''
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
He could win | Friend --

Everyone I know keeps asking me the same question: "He can't win, can he?"

News flash. He could.

In fact, there are a bunch of new polls out this week that have us in a dead heat with Donald Trump in the critical general election states of Ohio, Florida, and Pennsylvania.

Now, take public polls with a grain of salt, but it’s clear that this election is ACTUALLY going to be tight -- which means that if we start to get complacent, we're going to be looking at a Trump presidency.

We're getting ready to build an organization that can win in the critical battleground states -- but it takes serious resources to open hundreds of offices, hire field organizers, and train volunteers for what promises to be the election fight of a lifetime.

**This team can get it done, but we have to start right now. Chip in to the Battleground Fund to get us off the ground and get your free Team Hillary sticker as a thank you:** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU0NzYwMTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxOTEwODYxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU0NzYwMTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxOTEwODYxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Christina

Christina Reynolds
Deputy Communications Director
Hillary for America

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjU0NzYwMTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxOTEwODYxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjU0NzYwMTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxOTEwODYxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU0NzYwMTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxOTEwODYxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU0NzYwMTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxOTEwODYxS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU0NzYwMTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxOTEwODYxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU0NzYwMTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxOTEwODYxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU0NzYwMTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxOTEwODYxS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU0NzYwMTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxOTEwODYxS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU0NzYwMTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxOTEwODYxS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU0NzYwMTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxOTEwODYxS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU0NzYwMTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxOTEwODYxS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU0NzYwMTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxOTEwODYxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
